仅Redis 3.0实例的单机/主备实例进行配置，建议按Redis 3.0规格基: Configure only for single-node/primary-standby Redis 3.0 instances, recommended at 80% of the Redis 3.0 spec baseline bandwidth. Do not configure for other instances.

单机和主备实例，最大连接数限制为10000，可以根据业务情况对阈值进行调整。: For single-node and primary-standby instances the connection limit is 10000; adjust the threshold to your workload.
结合规格限制、网络瞬时输入流量和网络瞬时输出流量，查看是否扩容解决。\nRedi:
Check spec limits together with instantaneous inbound/outbound traffic to decide whether scaling up resolves it.
Only Redis 4.0+ instances support this metric; Redis 3.0 instances do not.
该指标对于统计周期内的测量对象的CPU使用率进行多次采样，表示多次采样的平均值。: This metric samples the CPU usage of the measured object multiple times within the statistics period and reports the average. Only single-node/primary-standby/read-write-splitting instances are supported.
